decisions.question: Frontend framework
decisions.rationale: React + routing + SSR built in. Full-featured for a dashboard app.

decisions.question: Charting library
decisions.rationale: React-native, declarative, good defaults. Most popular for React dashboards.

decisions.question: Styling / component library
decisions.rationale: Enterprise-grade, dashboard-friendly, built-in components for tables, forms, navigation. Supports dark mode natively.

guardrails: All source files must be TypeScript/TSX
No blank pages or broken layouts when data is missing
Empty states, loading indicators, and error messages must be handled
Charts must use resolved identities for unique user counts
